title: consolida regalis var. sparsiflora
intro: Consolida regalis var. sparsiflora, also known as the Larkspur or Delphinium consolida, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and sedative effects, which have been traditionally used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual disorders. The health benefits of Consolida regalis var. sparsiflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and infusions, are often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
